dashboard.plugInHint: Plug in a mouse and settings will appear here
dashboard.noDpiStages: This mouse has not shared DPI stages yet.
dashboard.dpiWriteUnavailable: DPI cannot be changed on this device right now.
dashboard.writeFailed: Write failed. Original mouse state preserved: {{error}}
dashboard.currentPollingRateEdit: Current polling rate: {{value}} Hz, click to edit
dashboard.pollingRateNotReportedEdit: Polling rate not reported, click to set
dashboard.pollingWriteHint: Pick a rate, Mira syncs it to the mouse and double-checks
dashboard.writeUnavailableHint: This one can't be changed right now
dashboard.detailsNote: Plugin readout details live here; adjustable items stay on the main screen.
dashboard.noCapabilities: This mouse hasn't shared more details yet
dashboard.pluginUpdateFoundBody: {{count}} installed plugin(s) have new versions available. Update them in Settings → Plugins.

theme.label: Theme mode
theme.hint: Follows the system, switching light and dark automatically

startHidden.label: Hide window at login
startHidden.hint: Only hide the main window for launch-at-login; manual opens and update restarts still show it

trayBattery.label: Show battery percentage
trayBattery.hint: The icon still fills by battery level; this just controls the number beside it
trayBattery.disabledHint: Windows tray can't show text beside the icon…

trayIconColor.label: Tray icon color
trayIconColor.hint: White for dark menu bars, black for light, follows system appearance

receiverBattery.label: Include receiver battery in title
receiverBattery.hint: Always show all device batteries in the tray menu

trayConnection.label: Show connection in menu
trayConnection.hint: Show connection type and device name in the tray menu

updateCheck.label: Check for Mira updates automatically
updateCheck.hint: Checks on launch, then every 6 hours while Mira keeps running

updateInstall.label: Auto download & install
updateInstall.hint: Auto-downloads and installs, prompts to restart when done

lowBattery.label: Low battery threshold: {{value}}%
lowBattery.hint: Notifies once when battery dips below threshold; silent while charging
lowBattery.tooltip: Notifies once when crossing the threshold, no repeated pop-ups

nightMode.label: Enable quiet lighting
nightMode.hint: Turns off the lights when triggers are met, restores the original look afterwards
nightMode.tooltip: Quiet lighting: turns off lights in the chosen scenarios, then restores the previous state. Only works when lighting can be changed.
nightMode.triggerTimeHint: Turn off lighting during a scheduled period
nightMode.triggerThemeHint: Turn off lighting when system switches to the specified theme
nightMode.triggerChargingHint: Turn off lighting while the mouse is charging
nightMode.triggerLowBatteryHint: Turn off lighting when battery is below {{value}}%
nightMode.targetReceiverHint: Turn off/restore receiver lighting (only settable when device supports it)

config.hint: Export for backup or moving computers; on import, Mira checks the plugin fit first, then syncs each item

pluginUpdateCheck.label: Automatically check for plugin updates
pluginUpdateCheck.hint: Checks signed installed plugins on launch, every 6 hours, and after returning online or to the foreground

pluginUpdate.noPlugins: No installed plugins found. The official installer bundles mira.amaster by default.

privacy.telemetryHint: Mira has no built-in telemetry; this option is always on
privacy.scanHint: List real HID devices matching installed plugins, for hardware testing
privacy.diagnosticsHint: Diagnostics are sanitized, no serial numbers or HID payloads

about.label: View about page
about.hint: Version, plugins, contact, licenses and notes

about.title: About
about.disclaimer: Mira is an independently developed tool, with no authorization, partnership, or endorsement from any manufacturer. Capabilities not verified on real hardware are not presented as stable support.

donate.hint: If you'd like to support me with a donation, I'd truly, truly appreciate it 🙏!!

about.noBundledPlugins: No bundled plugins found. The official installer bundles mira.amaster by default.
about.updateEnabledHint: Automatic checks are enabled; you can also check manually
about.updateDisabledHint: This build is not marked release-ready (releaseReady: false), so automatic updates are disabled. Download the latest from the GitHub Release page.
about.licenseHint: Mira is licensed under AGPL-3.0-or-later; original documentation uses CC-BY-SA-4.0. Third-party dependencies retain their original licenses.
about.viewLicenseDisabled: View open source license (requires GitHub link)
about.privacyHint: Mira has no telemetry, no accounts, no ads, no always-on networking. Diagnostics export is sanitized, no serial numbers or HID payloads. No data is ever uploaded without your confirmation.
about.reportIssueHint: Do not paste unsanitized serial numbers or sensitive logs when reporting issues.

lowBattery.title: Low battery alert
lowBattery.body: Mouse battery is below {{threshold}}% (currently {{percent}}%). Please charge the device.

updateFound.title: New version available
updateFound.body: v{{version}} is available. View and install it on the About page.

updateInstalled.title: Update ready
updateInstalled.body: Click to relaunch and complete the update.

pluginUpdateFound.title: Plugin updates available
pluginUpdateFound.body: {{count}} installed plugin(s) have new versions available. Update them in Settings → Plugins.

notification.mutationUnavailableBody: Official software (Logi Options+, G HUB, AMaster) is holding the mouse. Close them and try again.

batteryUsage.title: Battery Usage
batteryUsage.insightSectionHint: Generated by trend modeling, unusual-drain detection, and charging-habit inference
batteryUsage.clearConfirm: Clear battery history for this device? This will not affect device settings.
batteryUsage.disabledHint: You can enable it in Settings → Device → Battery.
batteryUsage.emptyHint: Keep Mira running for a while and charts will appear here.
batteryUsage.unsupportedTitle: This device has not reported battery information yet
batteryUsage.unsupportedHint: If the plugin supports battery reporting, Mira will record it automatically.
batteryUsage.notEnoughData: Not enough data to predict yet
batteryUsage.chargingHabitStartEnd: Usually starts charging around {{start}}% and stops around {{end}}%. Charged {{count}} times in the last 10 days.
batteryUsage.chargingHabitStartOnly: Usually starts charging around {{start}}%. Charged {{count}} times in the last 10 days.
batteryUsage.abnormalDrain2h: Battery dropped {{drop}}% in the last 2 hours, which is higher than usual.
batteryUsage.powerSavingTipLow: {{component}} is low. You can temporarily turn off lighting or lower the polling rate.
batteryUsage.averageDailyDrainMsg: Estimated average drain is about {{percent}}% per day.
batteryUsage.lowestLevelMsg: Lowest battery was {{level}}% in this period.
batteryUsage.unusualDrainAlertsHint: Notify using the existing alert system when a device drains faster than usual.
batteryUsage.recordEnabledHint: Used to generate 24-hour and 10-day battery charts, then analyze them locally with AI-style principles.
batteryUsage.retentionDaysHint: Records older than this will be automatically removed.
